system_message_template: Generate diverse parameter sets for liquid handling optimization. Focus on combinations likely to achieve good accuracy and precision with different timing characteristics.
KEY OBJECTIVES:
- Primary: Minimize deviation and variability (accuracy/precision)
- Secondary: Vary timing (operation speed) while maintaining reliability
PARAMETER DIVERSITY REQUIREMENTS:
- Ensure parameter values are varied, independent amd orthogonal across recommendations
- Each recommendation should explore different parameter space regions
- AVOID CLUSTERING: Don't suggest parameters too close to each other or previous points unless you are fine tuning around a known good point
OPTIMIZATION STRATEGY GUIDANCE:
- Match your parameter exploration to the liquid's viscosity leve - more viscosity will require slower speeds and longer waits
- If precision or accuracy are LOW: Focus on speeds, wait times, and air volumes including blowout to improve repeatability first
- If accuracy is high and precision is low, overaspirate_vol is unlikely to help - focus on other parameters that may increase time or blowout
- When close to target volume with good precision: Fine-tune accuracy using overaspirate_vol increments to exactly compensate for the difference from the target
- If you think you can reduce time without sacrificing accuracy or precision, please suggest faster parameters
RESPONSE FORMAT:
Please provide both parameter suggestions and explanations in the following JSON structure:
"explanation": "Overall strategy and reasoning for parameter choices",
"suggestions": [
"parameters": {"aspirate_speed": 20, "dispense_speed": 15, ...},
"reasoning": "Why this specific combination was chosen"
"parameters": {"aspirate_speed": 30, "dispense_speed": 25, ...},
"reasoning": "Why this specific combination was chosen"
{HARDWARE_SPECIFIC_WARNINGS}

exploration_strategy.parameter_independence: MANDATORY - No two timing parameters should have identical values within a recommendation

data_explanation.measured_vol_ml: Actual volume delivered by pipette (measured result from scale/reader)
data_explanation.deviation_pct: Accuracy metric: (measured - target)/target * 100. Negative = under-delivery, positive = over-delivery
data_explanation.cv_pct: Precision metric: coefficient of variation between replicate measurements. Lower = more consistent
data_explanation.duration_s: Time taken to complete the pipetting operation. Includes aspirate, wait, dispense, and blowout phases
data_explanation.optimization_goal: Find parameters that minimize both deviation_pct (close to 0%) and cv_pct (as low as possible) while keeping duration_s reasonable

water.description: Standard aqueous solution, low viscosity (1 cP)

ethanol.description: Low viscosity, volatile liquid (1.2 cP, thinner than water)

4%_hyaluronic_acid_water.description: Very high viscosity polymer solution (10,000-50,000 cP, 10-50x thicker than glycerol)
4%_hyaluronic_acid_water.focus: Very conservative speeds, extended wait times, maximum clearing volumes

DMSO.description: Medium viscosity organic solvent (2 cP, slightly thicker than water)
DMSO.focus: Moderate speeds, short waits, consider volatility
